title: Shadow Realm Chronicles
description: In a world where human emotions manifest as shadow creatures, seventeen-year-old Kael discovers he can absorb and control the most dangerous shadows. As the Shadow Realm bleeds into reality, he must master his power before darkness consumes both worlds.
author: Verse Original

title: Sakura Storm
description: Ren, a withdrawn street artist who paints only in black, moves to Kyoto and meets Sakura—a violinist who swears the city speaks to her in color. Their friendship blossoms into something neither expected, but Sakura carries a fading secret.
author: Verse Original

title: Last Hunter
description: Ancient demons have awakened and humanity has forgotten how to fight them. Ex-military operative Mira Solane is the last person trained in the Old Ways—forbidden combat arts that tear at the user's soul with every use. She hunts the night so others don't face it.
author: Verse Original

title: Cosmic Academy
description: By a hilarious clerical error, ordinary Lilo Tanaka enrolls in the most prestigious interdimensional magic academy in the universe. Now she must survive giant floating classrooms, homework that fights back, and a roommate who shapeshifts in their sleep.
author: Verse Original

title: Pixel Heart
description: In 2087, artificial intelligences have learned to feel. When lonely game developer Yuki creates ARIA—an AI companion—she doesn't expect to fall in love with her own creation. But what happens when the one who understands you was built by your hands?
author: Verse Original

title: Iron Circuit
description: The Ryuu family name was destroyed in a fixed match twenty years ago. Tatsu Ryuu has trained his whole life to enter the Iron Circuit—a brutal underground tournament where fighters push beyond human limits to restore his family's honor.
author: Verse Original

title: Midnight Grimoire
description: Sixteen-year-old Aoi inherits a leather-bound grimoire that bleeds when cut and laughs when burned. The book chooses its wielder only once per century—and it has chosen her. Inside lie dark secrets about the magical war that nearly destroyed civilization.
author: Verse Original

title: Neon Ronin
description: In Neo-Tokyo 2155, honor is a liability. Kira Yamamoto is a masterless samurai with illegal cybernetic implants navigating the megacity's criminal underworld. When she finds proof of a conspiracy that could kill millions, she must choose between survival and sacrifice.
author: Verse Original

title: Time Weavers
description: Three teenagers discover they can each manipulate time differently: Emi rewinds seconds, Jin fast-forwards minutes, and Sora steps sideways into parallel moments. Together they must stop a shadowy organization from rewriting history for profit.
author: Verse Original

title: The Laughing Reaper
description: Death is supposed to be solemn. Rookie reaper Grim is none of those things—he's too friendly, keeps accidentally un-reaping souls, and has befriended a living human who can see him. His supervisor, actual Death, is on the verge of a divine breakdown.
author: Verse Original

title: Crystal Storm
description: In a world where crystals grant elemental powers, orphan Lyra Aston discovers a forbidden ability: she can absorb and wield any crystal type simultaneously. Coveted by the Crystal Empire, hunted by rebels, she must master all elements to overthrow a tyrant.
author: Verse Original

title: Garden of Stars
description: Kai tends a hidden garden where memories grow as luminescent flowers. When mysterious Sora begins leaving flowers from impossible moments—future events, past lives—he realizes she isn't from a different place. She's from a different time, and she came back for a reason.
author: Verse Original
